description: Add Kami Phase start popup, War Phase start popup (with war upgrade bonus summary), and fix Fujin reward to work like Marshal (single figure selection/movement, allowing same figure to move twice). Also fix Susanoo reward popup to show VP gained.
steps: 1. Add a new 'Kami Phase start' popup. In the store, add a new state field kamiPhasePopupVisible (boolean, default false). When advancePlayer triggers a kami turn (isKamiTurn returns true), before setting kamiResolutionActive, set kamiPhasePopupVisible = true and kamiResolutionActive = false (delay the resolution). In GameBoard.tsx, render a popup when kamiPhasePopupVisible is true: show an elegant popup with the PoliticsTrack icon or a kami-themed icon, title 'Comienza la Fase Kami' / 'Kami Phase Begins', with an Accept button. Add a dismissKamiPhasePopup action that sets kamiPhasePopupVisible = false and then triggers the actual kami resolution (setting kamiResolutionActive = true with the temples data that was prepared).

2. Add a new 'War Phase start' popup. In the store, add warPhasePopupVisible (boolean, default false) and warPhaseUpgradeSummary (array of {playerName, clanId, bonuses: string[]}). When advancePhase transitions from politics to war (or when detectWarTransition fires), instead of immediately showing battles, set warPhasePopupVisible = true. Compute a summary of war upgrade card bonuses applied during initiateWarPhase by parsing the log entries that applyWarUpgrades added. Show a popup: 'Comienza la Fase de Guerra' / 'War Phase Begins', list each clan's war upgrade bonuses (if any), Accept button. On dismiss, set warPhasePopupVisible = false and proceed to battleStepPhase = 'popup'.

3. Fix Fujin reward to work like Marshal: In src/store/gameStore.ts doFujinMove, currently it receives fromProvince, toProvince, and figureIds (accepting all selected). Change the flow: Fujin should use the same moveMode/moveFrom/selectedFigures UI as Marshal. The user clicks a province (sets moveFrom), clicks ONE figure, clicks destination. The key difference from marshal: allow the SAME figure to be moved a second time (2 total moves, can be 2 different figures or the same figure twice). In gameLogic.ts moveForces, when called during Fujin (kamiResolutionActive && fujinMovesRemaining > 0), do NOT check marshalMovedFigures. Just validate single figure movement, adjacency (unless libelula), and move it. Remove the auto-selection of all figures in the Fujin flow.

4. Add a 'Cancel Movement' button during Fujin interactive mode, just like Marshal has. In GameBoard.tsx where the Fujin overlay is rendered, add a button that resets moveFrom and selectedFigures without consuming a move.

5. Update the Susanoo reward in KamiResolutionPopup.tsx: After the Susanoo kami is resolved, the popup should indicate how many VP the winner gained. Add a susanooVPGained field to the resolution temple data or compute it from the number of fortresses. Show it in the reward text like 'Gains X VP (X Fortresses on map)'.
6. Add all necessary i18n keys to en.ts and es.ts for: kami phase popup title/description, war phase popup title/description, Susanoo VP text, Fujin cancel movement button.
acceptance_criteria: Before Kami resolution begins, a popup appears saying 'Kami Phase Begins' that must be accepted
Before war battles begin, a popup shows 'War Phase Begins' with a summary of war upgrade bonuses per clan
Fujin works like Marshal: click province, click ONE figure, click destination. Same figure can move twice.
Fujin has a Cancel Movement button like Marshal
Susanoo reward popup shows the number of VP gained
The final kami before war does NOT trigger turn popup, and the war popup appears instead
verification: Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify no type errors
Run npx vite build to verify build succeeds
findings: All acceptance criteria implemented. The kamiPhasePopupPending flag is set in gameLogic.ts advancePlayer and detected in the store to show the popup before activating kami resolution. War transitions now show warPhasePopupVisible with upgrade summary computed from log entries. Fujin uses a dedicated branch in moveForces that enforces single-figure movement without marshalMovedFigures tracking. Susanoo VP is computed during advancePlayer when building kamiResolutionTemples data.
